completed_tasks.description: Criar tabela `plans` com campos (id, user_id, title, description, status, progress, created_at, updated_at)
Criar tabela `tasks` (id, plan_id, title, description, status, progress, priority, due_date, subtasks_json)
Criar tabela `projects` (id, user_id, title, status, progress, linked_tasks, description, archived)
Criar tabela `accounts` (id, user_id, account_type, account_name, status, value_usd, description, metadata_json)
Criar tabela `action_proposals` (id, user_id, action_type, description, parameters_json, status, created_at, expires_at)
Redesenhar layout principal com abas (Dashboard, Planning, Actions, Abilities, Tools, Resources, Device)
Criar componente `PlanningTab` com overview de planos e progresso
Criar componente `ActionQueue` listando ações pendentes com approve/reject
Criar componente `Dashboard` com widgets de summary
Testes de integração para fluxo de tarefa completo
Implementar AST parser para Python (extrair função, signatures, docstrings)
Criar `AbilityWrapper` generator (auto-gen Python wrapper com safety checks)
Tabela DB `abilities` com campos (name, description, source_repo, functions_json, version)
Tabela DB `skills` subset de abilities com parameters e examples
Criar componente `AbilitiesTab` com galeria de cards
Testes e2e para fluxo de discover + add habilidade
Criar `InstagramSession` wrapper com encrypted credential storage
Tabela DB `social_accounts` (id, user_id, platform, username, auth_token_encrypted, created_at, synced_at)
Tabela DB `saved_content` (id, account_id, ig_post_id, content_type, title, url, metadata_json, saved_at, category)
Tabela DB `content_collections` (id, user_id, collection_name, filters_json, created_at)
Criar componente `SocialTab` com list de contas conectadas
Integrar approval queue para ações sociais
Testes para Instagram session management (mock instagrapi)
Testes e2e para login + sync + categorização
Criar `DeviceProfiler` com detecção de OS, storage, RAM
Tabela DB `device_profiles` (user_id, device_type, os, storage_mb, ram_mb, capabilities, last_seen)
Criar `StorageOptimizer` com recomendações de limpeza e cache
Implementar `offline_first` sync strategy com local cache
Implementar `TVMode` layout (larger buttons, minimal text, voice focus)
Implementar `VoiceMode` com speech recognition + TTS fallback
Implementar `DeveloperMode` com console logs, metrics, device info
Tabela DB `security_issues` (id, severity, description, component, resolution, reported_at, status)
Criar `VulnerabilityReporter` que notifica usuário de problemas
Criar `ApiCostTracker` que logs/monitora uso de APIs pagas
Tabela DB `api_usage` (id, user_id, provider, endpoint, cost_usd, timestamp)
Implementar alertas de custo (email/notif quando > threshold)
Criar `ThemeBuilder` com seleção de cores e layouts
Integrar busca de referências (Unsplash, Pexels free APIs)
Otimizar queries de banco de dados
